series_metadata.series_description: A daily list of checks, money orders and cash received for deposit; to purchase permits, pay invoices or deposit money to an escrow account. Submitted daily to the Office of Accounting and Auditing with the OS-10 permit logs and OS-11 Permit Remittance Report for daily deposits.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper documents scanned ; Electronic: scanned images two years current year
